mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_shard, phone, bind_type, bind_time, verify_code, verify_ip, is_active, replace_time, replace_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_phone_bindings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_phone_bindings WHERE phone = #{phone} ORDER BY is_active DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_phone_bindings WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_active = 1
